reference: AND WHEN THE FISH WAS LANDED PANTING ON THE GRASS AND SHAG HAD BEEN ROUSED FROM HIS SLUMBER TO SLIP THE NOW LIMP FISH INTO THE CREEL COLONEL ASHLEY GAVE A SIGH OF RELIEF AND REMARKED I THINK I SEE IT NOW
text: And when the fish was landed, panting on the grass, and Shag had been roused from his slumber to slip the now-limp fish into the creel, Colonel Ashley gave a sigh of relief and remarked, "I think I see it now."
